2606.05548.title: ADK Arena: Evaluating Agent Development Kits via LLM-as-a-Developer
2606.05548.paper_summary: The rapid proliferation of Agent Development Kits (ADKs), SDK-level frameworks for building LLM-powered autonomous agents, has outpaced any empirical understanding of how framework choice affects agent performance. We propose \textbf{LLM-as-a-Developer}, a methodology that replaces human developers with an LLM coding agent that learns each framework's API from documentation, writes agent code, and iteratively repairs it through a validate-and-feedback loop until tests pass. By holding the developer constant and varying only the framework, generation effort becomes a quantitative proxy for API usability and the resulting agents provide a controlled measure of framework effectiveness. We implement this in \textbf{ADK Arena}, a fully automated pipeline with per-framework Docker isolation, a three-level validation pipeline, and benchmark adapters for SWE-bench, $τ^2$-bench, Terminal-Bench, and MCP-Atlas. Evaluating all 51 popular Python ADK frameworks (204 agent--benchmark pairs), we find that: (1)~generation succeeds for 57\% of runs, and its cost varies 5.6$\times$ across frameworks (\$0.6 to \$3.4 per agent), a quantitative proxy for API complexity, though cost alone does not predict success; (2)~no single framework dominates: the best single-benchmark ADK agents resolve up to 80\% of tasks and can even \emph{beat} general-purpose frontier coding agents at a fraction of the cost, yet the median framework resolves only 32\%; (3)~across information-source ablations, genuine framework usage stays within a narrow 28--40\% band (highest with raw source access and still 33\% with no reference material at all), indicating that documentation, source code, and parametric knowledge are largely substitutable rather than any one being a hard bottleneck.
2606.05548.paper_summary_zh: 快速增長的代理開發工具包（ADK）——用於構建基於LLM的自主代理的SDK級框架——已經超越了對框架選擇如何影響代理性能的任何實證理解。我們提出了\textbf{LLM-as-a-Developer}，這是一種方法論，通過一個LLM編碼代理來取代人類開發者，該代理從文檔中學習每個框架的API，編寫代理代碼，並通過驗證和反饋循環進行迭代修復，直到測試通過。通過保持開發者不變並僅變化框架，生成工作量成為API可用性的定量代理，而生成的代理提供了框架有效性的受控衡量。我們在\textbf{ADK Arena}中實現了這一點，這是一個完全自動化的管道，具有每個框架的Docker隔離、三層驗證管道，以及針對SWE-bench、$τ^2$-bench、Terminal-Bench和MCP-Atlas的基準適配器。評估所有51個流行的Python ADK框架（204個代理-基準對），我們發現：（1）生成在57\%的運行中成功，其成本在框架之間變化5.6$\times$（每個代理\$0.6到\$3.4），這是API複雜性的定量代理，儘管僅靠成本無法預測成功；（2）沒有單一框架主導：最佳的單基準ADK代理能解決多達80\%的任務，甚至可以以較低的成本\emph{擊敗}通用前沿編碼代理，但中位數框架僅解決32\%；（3）在信息源消融中，真正的框架使用保持在28--40\%的狹窄範圍內（在原始源訪問時最高，且在完全沒有參考材料的情況下仍為33\%），這表明文檔、源代碼和參數知識在很大程度上是可替代的，而不是任何一個是硬瓶頸。
2606.05548.author: Jintao Huang et.al.
2606.05548.authors: Jintao Huang, Xiaomin Li, Gaurav Mittal, Yu Hu
